_comments: Binds the shared AI scope JSONType (IAISecondaryScopes) to SecondaryScopes on MJ: AI Agent Notes
so CodeGen emits a typed SecondaryScopesObject accessor. Same shape as ScopedPromptPart /
the other agent scope fields (ExecuteAgentParams.SecondaryScopes); CodeGen emits a
per-entity prefixed copy of the type (no collision). Applied via mj sync push.

primaryKey.ID: @lookup:MJ: Entity Fields.EntityID=@lookup:MJ: Entities.Name=MJ: AI Agent Notes&Name=SecondaryScopes
